MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER OR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION FILED BY OTHER KERRY INC.

LAW AND MOTION 301, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF DOGSTAR SALES LLC, DOING BUSINESS AS ARTICOS' ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. THE COURT ORDERED TO MODIFY THE EXISTING ORDER. PARTIES WILL AGREE UPON A RECEIVER. DEFENDANTS BOUEY IS TO REPORT ALL NEW CONTRACTS AND BILLS WITHIN 10 DAYS TO THE RECEIVER AND COPIES TO ALL PARTIES. PROFIT TO BUOEY IS TO BE WITHHELD BY THE RECEIVER. RECEIVER IS TO REPORT TO ALL PARTIES. PARTIES HAVE 5 DAYS TO SEND PAYMENT UPON RECEIVING THE REPORT. ALL REPORTS AND OBJECTIONS SHOULD BE IN WRITING AND DELIVERED BY FAX OR SAME DAY DELIVERY. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO POST A BOND OF $15,000 ON OR BEFORE 12/9/2002. MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO REVOKE AMENDED TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION; MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED DANIEL BOUEY'S MOTION. AFTER DISCUSSION, THE COURT ORDERED TO MODIFY THE EXISTING ORDER. PARTIES WILL AGREE UPON A RECEIVER. DEFENDANTS BOUEY IS TO REPORT ALL NEW CONTRACTS AND BILLS WITHIN 10 DAYS TO THE RECEIVER AND COPIES TO ALL PARTIES. PROFIT TO BUOEY IS TO BE WITHHELD BY THE RECEIVER. RECEIVER IS TO REPORT TO ALL PARTIES. PARTIES HAVE 5 DAYS TO SEND PAYMENT UPON RECEIVING THE REPORT. ALL REPORTS AND OBJECTIONS SHOULD BE IN WRITING AND DELIVERED BY FAX OR SAME DAY DELIVERY. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO POST A BOND OF $15,000 ON OR BEFORE 12/9/2002. MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-27-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2003 Off Calendar

MOTION To Seal Pleadings
Off Calendar Jan-22-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- PLAINTIFF DOGSTAR SALES LLC, DOING BUSINESS AS ARTICO's MOTION To Seal Pleadings -- granted.
The documents were:
1. Memorandum in support of ex parte application for TRO & OSC re: preliminary injunction, filed 11/20/2002.
2. Plaintiff's Exhibits in support of ex parte application for TRO adn OSC re: Preliminary Injunction, filed 11/20/2002.
3. Declaration of Susan Cronenwett in support of exparte application for TRO & OSC re: preliminary injunction, filed 11/20/2002.
4. declaration of Jaye Johnson in support of ex parte application for TRO & OSC re: preliminary injunction, filed 11/20/2002.
(DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

MOTION To Seal Pleadings

MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF DOGSTAR SALES LLC, DBA ARTICO'S MOTION To Seal Pleadings -- Continued TO 1/22/03 per moving party. (JJM/301/MD) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER
Off Calendar Dec-03-2002 Off Calendar

MOTION To Revoke Amended Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction; Exhibits In Support
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Patricia A. Rowe, Esq., 925/256-1000, for defendants Daniel S. Bouey and Foodlinks, LLC, moving to revoke amended temporary restraining order and order to show cause regarding preliminary injunction
Charles J. Wisch, Esq., 788-1945, for plaintiff and opposing party Dogstar Sales LLC dba Artico Products
Steven B. Sacks, Esq., SHEPPARD MULLIN 434-9100, for defendant Kerry Inc.
* A R G U E D and the Court the Court GRANTED PLAINTIFF DOGSTAR SALES LLC, DOING BUSINESS AS ARTICOs' Order To Show Cause RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. The parties were ordered to meet and confer about the verification of expenses and reported to the Court.
** After discussion, the Court ordered to modify the existing order. Parties will agree upon a receiver. Defendants Bouey is to report all new contracts and bills within 10 days to the receiver and copies to all parties. Profit to Buoey is to be withheld by the receiver. Receiver is to report to all parties. Parties have 5 days to send payment upon receiving the report. All reports and objections should be in writing and delivered by fax or same day delivery. On any claims, parties should make an ex-parte application.
*** Plaintiff is ordered to post a bond of $15,000 on or before 12/9/2002.
Moving party is to prepare an order. (JJM/MD/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855

Steven B. Sacks, Esq., SHEPPARD MULLIN 434-9100, for defendant and opposing party Kerry Inc.
* A R G U E D and the Court the Court GRANTED PLAINTIFF DOGSTAR SALES LLC, DOING BUSINESS AS ARTICOs' Order To Show Cause RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. The parties were ordered to meet and confer about the verification of expenses and reported to the Court.
** After discussion, the Court ordered to modify the existing order. Parties will agree upon a receiver. Defendants Bouey is to report all new contracts and bills within 10 days to the receiver and copies to all parties. Profit to Buoey is to be withheld by the receiver. Receiver is to report to all parties. Parties have 5 days to send payment upon receiving the report. All reports and objections should be in writing and delivered by fax or same day delivery. On any claims, parties should make an ex-parte application.
*** Plaintiff is ordered to post a bond of $15,000 on or before 12/9/2002.
